name: claude-code-pathfix
description: Claude Code hook that transparently converts Windows paths to POSIX in Bash commands — eliminating retry loops and saving tokens
author: fnrhombus

scripts.sync-plugin-version: node -e "const fs=require('fs');const p=require('./package.json');const f='./.claude-plugin/plugin.json';const j=JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync(f,'utf8'));j.version=p.version;fs.writeFileSync(f,JSON.stringify(j,null,2)+'\n');console.log('synced plugin.json to',p.version);"
